mapper.sql: version_id AS "versionId", tenant_id AS "tenantId", user_id AS "userId", resume_id AS "resumeId", version_no AS "versionNo", source, title, created_at AS "createdAt"
mapper.select: SELECT , LENGTH(snapshot_json) AS "snapshotBytes" FROM resume_writer_version WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY version_no DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT , snapshot_json AS "snapshotJson" FROM resume_writer_version WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND version_id = #{versionId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM resume_writer_version WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND version_id = #{versionId}
